exact_predicate_contracts: orient2d uses adaptive-precision exact predicates (robust crate)
orient3d uses adaptive-precision exact predicates (robust crate)
incircle and insphere follow exact-sign classification semantics
near-collinear and near-coplanar inputs retain non-zero sign when geometrically non-zero
diagnostic_contracts: policy defaults align to vcad tolerance baseline (1e-6 mm, 1e-9 rad)
default predicate strategy is AdaptiveExact for geometry classification
derived predicates (point_on_segment, point_on_plane) are built from exact orientation checks
